#  Where do I go for help with Procore Submittals + Bluebeam? 
##### In Beta
The Procore + Bluebeam integration is currently in beta and can be enabled with[ Procore Explore](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/admin-company/tutorials/manage-features-with-procore-explore).
For any queries or assistance regarding the Procore Submittals + Bluebeam integration during the beta program, reach out to your Procore point of contact.
## See Also
  * [How do I join the Bluebeam Integration Beta Program?](https://v2.support.procore.com/faq-how-do-i-join-the-bluebeam-integration-beta-program)
  * [How do I leave the Bluebeam Integration Beta Program or disable the Bluebeam integration?](https://v2.support.procore.com/faq-how-do-i-leave-the-bluebeam-integration-beta-program-or-disable-the-bluebeam-integration)
  * [Submittal Worklow](https://v2.support.procore.com/reference-Submittal_Worklow)
title: Where do I go for help with Procore Submittals + Bluebeam?
